context: A child practices a simple ukulele tune at home in a bright room filled with music and warmth.

actions.description: Child sits cross legged on the blue rug and begins strumming the yellow ukulele.
Fingers move across the strings and fretboard while the child concentrates on the melody.
Child glances up with a bright smile as sunlight catches the instrument and music sheets.
